programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Tim Jardine was persuaded by his friends Amy and Claude to blackmail his father for 50,000 dollars. Nevertheless, Jardine's father is facing bankruptcy and Claude loses his patience and becomes a criminal.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A runaway housewife gets involved with a gang of thieves plotting an armored-car heist.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo's Japanese pen pal, Nobuko, comes for a visit to the U.S. and stays at the Shady Rest.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A psychiatrist suggests that Homer Bedloe learns to love the Cannonball in order to stop the recent nightmares he has been experiencing about the engine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head home to the Ozarks with the goal of getting Elly May married before Elverna Bradshaw's daughter does. And with the Silver Dollar Fair about to start, they believe they'll be able to meet a lot of young, single men. Granny has something else going on besides getting Elly a husband: she is fighting with her enemy, Elverna Bradshaw, and betting her granddaughter will marry before Elverna’s daughter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her search to get a man for Elly, though fears her mission might be harder with Elly having entered the cake-baking contest. Back at the mansion, Jethro becomes restless in Beverly Hills and decides to join his family in the hills, especially after hearing about the fair going on. Miss Jane comes along, being told by Drysdale to keep her watch on the family and not to let Elly get serious about a man.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: My Pop, My Pop, Pre-hysterical Man, I Eats My Spinach
programme.desc: "Popeye is building a boat when his daddy, Poopdeck Pappy, insists on helping., Olive Oyl discovers a caveman and dinosaur in Yellowstone Park., At the rodeo, Bluto sets his sights on Olive."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Advance And Be Mechanized, The Lost Chick, Haunted Mouse
programme.desc: "Tom is a space security guard and he uses his cat robot to chase Jerry's mouse robot as it attempts to sneak some cheese out of the Mining Facility., Two squirrels find an egg that rolled away from the mother hen's nest and when it hatches they do their best to try and take care of the chick., Jerry’s Uncle comes to visit him and, along with freeing some animals Tom has eaten, causes all kinds of havoc for the cat."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Tragic Magic, Tricky Trout, Broadway Bow Wows, Fair Weather Fiends, Kiddie Koncert, Kittens' Mittens, Kiddie League
programme.desc: "A magician tries to get revenge on Woody for heckling his act by asking him to assist with some tricks. However, Woody turns the table on the magician by casting his own magic spell on him., Chilly tries to steal trout from a trout hatchery run by Wally Walrus., John the showbiz dog leaves his fiancee and their double act for another woman only to return to her when her solo act is more successful than his., A storm strands Woody and Wolfie on a deserted island, and they battle each other to find food., Wally conducts a whimsical animal band., Three kittens blame their lost mittens on a vagabond cat, who will bear the punishment if they don't tell the truth., Woody's Kiddle League Baseball team is in the championships and antic ensue."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Rabbit Transit, A Tale Of Two Mice, Daffy Duck Hunt, Falling Hare, The Crackpot Quail, Hare-way To The Stars
programme.desc: "Bugs and Cecil Turtle decide to have their own "tortoise and the hare" race. , Babbit and Catstello try to steal some cheese from under the nose of the house cat. , Porky goes hunting with his dog. They encounter a completely wacky Daffy, who dodges all Porky's bullets and breaks into a can-can dance. , A gremlin hijacks a WWII bomber and Bugs must stop him before the gremlin does some serious damage. , A goofy dog decides to go off hunting for quails. He runs into a wise-guy quail similar to Bugs Bunny -- who gives him similar trouble. , Suffering from a rabbit-hangover, Bugs accidentally climbs onto a rocket ship and is taken to Marvin the Martian's home. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Simian Terror
programme.desc: A visit to the plantation of a U.S. Senator reveals a mysterious family past that intersects with a doctor infamous for his experiments with apes. The agents are lucky enough to arrive just as the Senator's forgotten giant son and his friend, a giant ape, are rampaging through the plantation.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.sub-title: The Ricky And Laura Bell Story
programme.desc: Laurie and Ricky Bell uproot and go west, leaving their comforts in Baltimore. When Laurie announces she is pregnant, Ricky is less than happy as he feels she has just made their lives more complicated, especially where it concerns his needs.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stage passengers, including Victoria, Jarrod and Heath, are abandoned in the middle of the desert by robbers.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A rancher tries to save his property from foreclosure.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Will Griner is acquitted of a murder after two key witnesses disappear before the trial. When a bloodthirsty lynch mob comes after him, thinking that he silenced the witnesses, Griner goes to the Cartwrights for help.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A black Army sergeant, being pursued by the Army on cowardice and desertion charges, joins Favor's trail drive. The troopers finally catch up to him, but Favor wonders how such a decent and competent person could be guilty of those charges.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: A rancher having a dispute with his foster son hires Paladin to keep one of them from killing the other in a duel.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City? The townsfolk celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane, but just as quickly turn on him when Kane breaks loose and demands a hostage to ensure his escape.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: A Ducking They Did Go, A Plumbing We Will Go, Scrambled Brains, Rip, Sew, And Stitch, Horses' Collars, I'll Never Heil Again
programme.desc: "After recruiting the police chief, governor and mayor into what turns out to be a sham duck hunting club, the Stooges cleverly find a way to avoid jail. , To escape the police, the Stooges pose as plumbers and are hired to fix a leak in a fancy mansion. They wind up crossing the electrical system with the plumbing and generally ruin the place. One memorable scene has the lady of the house tuning into a television broadcast from Niagara Falls as a torrent of water pours from the set. To escape the wrath of the homeowners the Stooges escape through a magician's trap door. , A follow up to "You Natzy Spy", the Stooges have taken over the country of Moronica. Moe is Hailstone the Dictator, Curly is a Field Marshall and Larry is Minister of Propaganda. The Stooges are planning with their allies to conquer the world, which mainly consists of fighting over a globe. The former king's daughter gets into their headquarters and plants a bomb, which Curly detonates. All ends well as the king regains control of the country and the Stooges wind up as trophies on the wall. , Shemp is a sick man, suffering from hallucinations. His worst vision is that his ugly nurse Nora is actually beautiful. When Moe and Larry come to take him home from the sanitarium, they discover he's become engaged to Nora. On the way to Nora's apartment for the wedding, the boys get in a fight with a stranger who promises to get even with them if he ever sees them again. They arrive to finding Nora waiting for her father, who, when he arrives, turns out to be the man they just fought with. , The Stooges run a tailor shop and need money to pay their creditors. A bank robber leaves his coat in the shop with a combination to a safe. When the crook comes back to retrieve the coat, the Stooges capture him and get his bankroll. , The Stooges are private detectives in the old West trying to help a girl recover an IOU from a bad guy. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Honeymooning in Hungary, Joan and Peter Allison share their train compartment with Dr. Vitus Verdegast, a courtly but tragic man who is returning to the remains of the town he defended before becoming a prisoner of war for fifteen years. When their hotel-bound bus crashes in a mountain storm and Joan is injured, the travellers seek refuge in the home, built fortress-like upon the site of a bloody battlefield, of famed architect Hjalmar Poelzig. There, cat-phobic Verdegast learns his wife's fate, grieves for his lost daughter, and must play a game of chess for Allison's life."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: When the Joker attempts to recruit high school dropouts for his gang, it's up to Batman and Dick Grayson to teach the students to make better choices.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: A transporter malfunction causes Captain Kirk to split into his "good" and "evil" selves, and a landing party will freezes to death if they don't merge the two back together.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Perry White is a key witness in a gangster trial. But on the eve of his testimony, he believes he hears a ghost. Superman must restore the editor's credibility.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Superman helps an Indian leader through superhuman ordeals to win the chief's bonnet of the tribe.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Jimmy Hapgood lands on the planet and the Robinsons befriend him. After helping him fix his spaceship, the Robinsons try and convince him to take Will and Penny back to Earth with him. But Dr. Smith tries to get aboard the ship back to Earth.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The Seaview is nearly destroyed by a giant Portuguese man o' war when a scientist tries to force Nelson and Crane to retrieve youth serum data from his sunken research ship.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: A deaf boy tracks Fitzhugh to the Spindrift and takes it home to the seafront community where he lives. The Earthlings must recover it, and their only bargaining chip is their advanced knowledge with which they can build a hearing aid for the boy.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In Paris during the French Revolution, the time travelers agree to aid Marie Antoinette in exchange for safe-conduct passes.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A woman discovers an injured alien.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Adams saves a man, Will Boker, from drowning. Will states he lost his possessions by the river. Adams goes back but finds a lot of money in a carpetbag. He questions Will, who says he came by it accidentally - or did he really?"

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Comparisons and contrasts are drawn as Marlin and Jim analyze the behavior of the lion in his natural habitat in Africa and in the zoo."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Rivers of fire and erupting volcanoes in British East Africa have created a crater called Ngora Ngora, which shields the great herds of African wildlife from the advances of man. By plane to the top of the crater and by jeep into the crater, we study one of the truly last strongholds of the wild kingdom."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "What happens to the creatures living in the wilderness when their natural habitat is destroyed? Some die out…others move to a new home, and some like the coyote and opossum have journeyed far beyond their original range. Others move in, attracted by food or by the elimination of their natural enemies. Camped in a wilderness area on the fringe of civilization, Marlin Perkins explores the why and hows of this cross-migration."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "In the southeastern coastal plain of the United States in Georgia, there exists one of the world’s truly unique jingle swamps named by the Indians OKEEFENOKEE (land of floating islands). Here in this intricate maze of river-ways with its ferns, grasses and cane growths, Marlin Perkins and Jim Fowler explore a fairytale jungle that is one of the last strongholds of the alligator. The jungle suddenly becomes marshland, also called wet prairies, with water 1 to 4 feet deep. Here in profusion fly hundreds of American egrets, the swamp fisherman. Jim uses the Indian soap plant to wash his hands, and Marlin tries to balance on one of the floating hammocks or floating islands of “quaking earth.” We witness the lassoing, from a boat, of a bear that has moved in too close to civilization. After being caged, he is moved into the interior on an island that can support him, and we follow his encounters with an alligator, a skunk, and an alligator snapping turtle."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Winter is night, summer is day, and you need your wits to survive in the forbidding land north of the Arctic Circle. In this story you go by walrus skin boat, dogsled, airplane and helicopter. You hunt seal with Eskimos, find polar bear and beluga whale. You round up a large herd of reindeer and tag them for conservation officials. And you watch Jim Fowler discover a far-north version of a popular rodeo event: bulldogging moose from a helicopter."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "All roads are closed, but by helicopter and snow plane Marlin and Jim travel though the park to uncover a fascinating story of animal life in winter."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cindy has been cast as in the school play, but learns she can only invite one parent to the show. Torn between whom she should choose, Cindy fakes an injury to get out of being in the play altogether.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: No longer feeling needed around the Brady household, Alice makes up a story about an ailing aunt in Seattle in order to leave. Later the family finds out the truth and launches "Operation Alice" in an attempt to make her stay.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: An ill Richie is home alone while the rest of the family go to see Cinerama. Hearing noises downstairs, he investigates and finds a burglar!

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: When Laverne and Shirley unwittingly double-date with two criminals intent on robbing the bank next to the Pizza Bowl, the girls find themselves being held as hostages.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, trying to lift Barney's spirits, stages a minor robbery and tries to match his deputy with a shy seamstress.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mario, the Ricardos and Mertzes' gondolier in Venice, comes to New York to surprise his brother, Dominic, but turns up at the Ricardos' apartment when he can't find him. Lucy is sure Dominic is in San Francisco and sets out to help Mario raise the bus fare. Her earnest efforts pay off in a surprising way.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Miss Landers assigns Beaver's class to write a short essay about the most interesting character they know. While Judy writes about her dad, Beaver debates over whom he should write about. Beaver finally decides to write about Ward, but Beaver isn't sure if Ward is interesting enough.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally becomes the chairman of the blind date committee for an upcoming dance. However, Wally quickly wants to resign from the position when he can't find anyone to go with the new girl, Jill Bartlett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Matthew Templeton says he’d be proud to marry Elly, the Clampetts begin to plan and rehearse Elly's wedding. Meanwhile, Drysdale tries to stop this wedding from happening, or at least from losing his largest account. He goes to Silver Dollar City and decides to buy the Bank of Bugtussle so he can still handle his favorite account.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly are preparing for the wedding, but a big blow comes when Matthew mentions that he has a wife, and Granny learns he is really a preacher, saying he’d marry Elly because he marries people every day. Meanwhile, con man Shifty Shafer, a.k.a. Honest John, comes to Silver Dollar City and, after hearing how much money they have, he persuades the hillbillies to go to New York with him.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The exiled president of a revolution-torn country visits the island.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A NASA satellite with a TV camera, accidentally lands on the island instead of the intended target: Mars.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama is one of only two people at cousin Ludie's funeral, she decides to spend funds meant for a family vacation and bowling competition to ensure a suitable funeral for herself.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama claims to have a date for Valentine's Day, Iola hires an escort—and it's painfully obvious that he's an escort.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman falls for a paid escort; Gopher learns about a ghost aboard; Vicki aims for sophistication to attract a boy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy becomes upset when Opie contributes a measly three cents to the Underprivileged Children's drive.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Andrew Somer shares his smurf-tastic Smurf collection, including original Smurf toy prototypes, sentimental pieces from a lifetime of collecting, rare vintage store displays, and more. Expert appraiser John Ragusa attempts to make a “smurfy” trade with Andrew by bringing him something that’s a perfect match for his love of both store displays and Smurf."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The military police think they've solved a rash of thefts at the 4077th when they apprehend Klinger with Hawkeye's stolen camera.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. and Hawkeye resolve to clear Klinger's name after he chooses Winchester to defend him at his military court-martial.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is all excited when an old friend whom he used to work with, Joe Tucker, stops by for a visit. Archie soon discovers that Joe, who has been unemployed for quite some time, is trying to get a job at Archie's plant. Archie soon tries to sabotage Joe's efforts to land a job at the loading dock because he's afraid the man might be in line for his position.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria befriends the box boy, George, who works at the local supermarket and happens to be mentally handicapped. When Archie discovers this, all of his misconceptions come pouring out and he encourages Gloria not to lead him on. Meanwhile, Archie encourages George to take a break at the Bunker's while George is still on the clock. George's father storms over to the Bunker's home with the bad news that George has been fired.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith, Mike and Gloria are each extended a special invitation to attend Lionel's engagement party. However, Archie isn't invited, that is until a big argument between Louise and George results in Louise deciding to invite him. Later, during the party, George is in for a big shock when it turns out that Lionel's fiancée, Jennie has interracial parents.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home for a nice dinner that Edith has prepared: beef and mushroom stew. Later, when Mike comes to the table for dinner, he finds Archie has completely finished his meal and then breaks the news that there has been a recall at the supermarkets of a certain brand of mushroom. Convinced that he has food poisoning, Archie rushes down to the hospital for treatment.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Nanette Fabray And Ken Berry
programme.desc: "Guests Nanette Fabray and Ken Berry. Originally aired on 10/12/70."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Gwen Verdon And Pat Boone
programme.desc: "Guests Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone. Originally aired on 11/03/69."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: I Do Not Choose To Run: Part 1
programme.desc: Rob is asked to run for city councilman.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: The Making Of A Councilman: Part 2
programme.desc: While running for New Rochelle city councilman, Rob realizes his opponent is much more knowledgeable.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph, after making a suggestion at work, is laid off. Alice decides to take a job as a secretary, but tells her boss that Ralph is her brother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: His newspaper in financial trouble, a man agrees when a stranger appears and offers to pay off the debts and run the linotype machine.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man is trapped in an office with the body of the woman he just murdered.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF dupe two foreign agents into gathering intelligence on a bogus missile guidance system. However, the mission is interrupted when a psychotic kidnaps Dana.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A man who knew Kimble during one of his disguises, meets him again. He tells him that on one of his hurried, silent departures from a town, he left behind evidence which indicated he was dead and an innocent man is being held for his murder.

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "The fact that Senator John Elton miraculously survived the plane crash and Ellen Nevin's husband (pilot of the plane) was killed, leaves no doubt in her mind: it's murder. She hires private investigator Harry O to prove it."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are convinced that "Brother" William Bentley's Temple of the Expanded Mind is just a sham—a front for Bentley to sell LSD to the students of a nearby elementary school.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Citizens are full of praise for Officer Gideon C. Dengle, wanting to bestow him with awards, honors and home-baked cookies. There's only one problem: there's no such officer in the LAPD.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed starts a flu epidemic that decimates the city's police force, forcing him and Malloy to work a double shift. During day watch, he and Malloy encounter a bookmaker being held at gunpoint, mediate a dispute over a cantaloupe, investigate a possible robbery in progress, engage in a foot chase with an athletic young man and pull over a motorist who turns out to be a VIP.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Newly appointed Police Commissioner Edna Dixon accompanies Malloy and Reed on night watch, where they deal with a naked elderly wino at a bar, try to diffuse a possible riot situation following a gang-related stabbing and pursue a deaf teenager in a stolen car.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony celebrate the Christmas in July traditions of the Southern Hemisphere... and meet South Pole Santa!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward and June allow Wally to babysit Beaver one evening while they attend a party. However, things go awry when Beaver gets ready to take a bath. He accidentally lets the bathtub overflow, causing the water to leak onto the bathroom floor and into the downstairs ceiling.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After leaving the cap off the ink, Beaver is grounded to the house for a whole day after spilled ink ruins some of Ward's papers. However, Larry and Beaver sneak out to the movies and when Beaver wins a bike, he must find a way to keep it a secret from his parents.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Tsarina's Tiara
programme.desc: When a jeweler and gem expert is pulled over for speeding, the corpse of an international jewel thief is found in the trunk.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a troubled young woman is accused of murder, her late father's former business partner hires Matlock to prove her innocence.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Lana's ex-boyfriend comes to see her and brings a load of stolen rifles with him.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Another woman begins to play the church organ instead of Grandma which upsets Grandma

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt accompanies a young woman on a treacherous journey across the desert, where the pair must brave sandstorms, thirst and Indians.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Dan Logan is hired as a range detective to stop a cattle rustling outbreak, but when he is framed for murder he needs the help his old friends, the Cartwrights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshal Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Ever since he was young, Tom Tuckett has been sent to good schools and looked after by an unknown benefactor. When he joins the wagon train, Tuckett sets out to discover who the mysterious benefactor is—and is shocked when the individual's identity is reveal.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A temporary captain from "the old school" doesn't feel Gage and DeSoto should be practicing "medicine." An elderly man sets his chair on fire. Dr. Early keeps coming up with oranges when all he wants is an apple. The paramedics struggle to save a heart attack victim. A boy with asthma gets trapped in a storm drain. Dr. Brackett uses an old-fashioned sedative on a biker.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: To boost post-yuletide morale on Dec 26, Potter has the officers and enlisted men change places for the day.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Follies Of The Living - Concerns Of The Dead
programme.desc: While suffering a fever, Klinger communicates with the spirit of a dead soldier, Private Weston, who stays on to witness his own last rites.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret's birthday plans are spoiled when she and Klinger get stranded on a desolate roadside. Meanwhile, Charles gives a lecture for Margaret, and the surgeons assist in the delivery of a calf.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is outraged when a sensationalistic war correspondent, Clayton Kibbee, reports irresponsible G.I. stunts as tales of military valor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy strives to end a long-running feud between two neighboring families.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie's decision to run for town council sparks a battle of the sexes.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Jethro return to Elly and Jed after visiting Pearl back home. Granny returns with presents and a new device, a telephone. For Granny, this phone is high tech. She gets Jethro to install it, but he installs wrong, connecting wires to a light pole instead of a telephone pole, electrocuting himself, causing it to blow up and making Granny go temporarily deaf.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: "Ralph sleeps at the Nortons' to avoid his visiting mother-in-law. "

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to kidnap Burkhalter to trade him for an underground agent but ends up with Klink.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Who Stole My Copy Of Mein Kampf?
programme.desc: Hogan plans to eliminate a beautiful allied defector who is giving Klink an award.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man on a walking trip of post-World War I Europe gets caught in a storm. He takes shelter in a remote monastery and finds a mysterious prisoner.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Two-faced Turnabout
programme.desc: When a Balkan dictator with ties to an American businessman dies, the race is on to destroy papers belonging to him that may implicate the businessman in corruption.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon learn that a young man has called his mother from Hollywood "to say goodbye." With the help of the man's sister, the two detectives trace the impending suicide to a hotel with more than 1,200 rooms.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Sylvia will do anything to get her ex-husband back into her life.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Tommy Greer is a crime buff who decides to commit a motiveless murder in order to confuse the police, selecting his victim from a phone book at random.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A former championship diver, now disabled, believes she is going to be murdered after receiving death threats.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Publisher Quigley asks Cannon for help. He believes that hotel proprietor Rawdon has killed six girls. When the seventh victim is found, however, it's Quigley himself who becomes the prime suspect. A lab assistant manipulates the samples used in the framework of the murders.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby looks into a 20-year-old case hoping to find clues to an elderly doctor's death.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A teenage runaway, intent on becoming a star, has instead wound up in pornographic films. Acting on behalf of the girl's aunt, Friday and Gannon try to find the young "starlet."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Sgt. Friday is offered a bribe to assist a gypsy family trying to gain control of the gypsy community.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed search for a suspected child stealer who has escaped custody with the baby after being arrested for shoplifting baby formula. Meanwhile, Reed has to think quickly when he is held at gunpoint while responding to a burglary.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed have a difficult night ahead of them when they get stuck with an old patrol car that it is riddled with problems. On patrol, they deal with a female car thief, chase down a prowler with a sympathetic story, pull over a motorist who points out an ironic detail, investigate suspicious activity at a warehouse and pursue an armed robbery suspect.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony enjoy some fun in the sun aboard a Santa Cruise!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver's class holds a "Most Beautiful Baby" contest in which each student is supposed to bring in a baby picture. To make the deadline, June picks out a cute picture of Beaver at the last minute and sends it to Miss Landers, not realizing that the cute picture may cause Beaver embarrassment.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward saves an old pedometer from being thrown out and gives it to Beaver, but not before telling him a story about when he was a kid he would walk 20 miles a day. Taking the story literally, Beaver makes a bet with Whitey that he, too, can walk 20 miles in a day.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fanciful Frail
programme.desc: Things keep going from awful to good grief for poor Ethel Andrews. First she's left at the altar by her fiancee, Bruce Strickland, who also lets her take the blame for a $50,000 securities theft.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock's new neighbor, Les "Ace" Calhoun (Don Knotts), is charged with murdering the used car salesman who sold him a lemon, Matlock takes the case to prove that more than one person had a motive.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Luann moonlights as a singer at a nightclub and finds romance with the clubs owner. Her happiness is short-lived when she realizes that the bartender is dealing drugs.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Elizabeth has nightmares about being trapped on a Ferris wheel.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young man is unwelcoming toward the young Indian bride his father brings home.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Matthew Rush runs afoul the embittered Nagle clan, he and his love, Susan, the Nagle's daughter, fear for their lives and turn to the Cartwrights for help.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother, he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: David Forest always believed his father to be as he claimed. When Tracy Sadler joins the wagon train his beliefs are altered when he slowly and painfully learns the truth about his father's past.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Johnny is assigned to conduct a school tour of Rampart hospital; the youngsters are highly inquisitive. A veteran mentally reliving a battle is subdued by the paramedics; he turns out to have a brain tumor. A woman gets stuck in a dog door. A famous novelist attempts suicide. A cargo plane crashes in a residential area, hitting a school bus.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: An AWOL soldier, Nick Gillis, seeks sanctuary in the mess tent, after Father Mulcahy's service. At the same time, a special Sunday brunch is due to be served, following the donation of some eggs to the camp by a grateful farmer.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: The Tooth Shall Set You Free
programme.desc: Charles has a serious toothache, but hates the thought of having anything done about it. The doctors suspect prejudice when an inordinate number of black casualties are brought in from a single unit, led by Major Weems.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter sends for Sidney Freedman when he loses confidence in his surgical abilities, and Winchester loses patience with his bunkmates' sloppiness.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Where There's A Will, There's A War
programme.desc: Hawkeye goes to help at an aid station, and under heavy shelling he draws up a will, leaving various items to his friends at the 4077th.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A modern-day Scrooge (businessman Ben Weaver) causes trouble on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a stranger comes to town, Barney and the people of Mayberry grow suspicious when he seems to know too much about them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny enters Elly in a soup-making contest, with her own Snider Surprise soup. When Jed finds out Granny cheated, he demands that she pull Elly May out of the contest. But Granny refuses to because this is a way to get Elly a husband. She tricks Jed into believing she got Elly out of the contest and gets him to go hunting, just in time. The men from Savory Soup visit the mansion and are amazed by the beautiful Elly, thinking she’d be a beetle.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph is busy buying Alice a vacuum while Norton is the deciding vote in the Raccoon election for convention manager.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and the daughter of a German general try to photograph her father's plans designed to prolong the war.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A baroness is asked by Klink to get secrets out of Hogan, and he complies by giving her a British agent with phony invasion plans.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bandaged young woman awaits the outcome of an experimental treatment that has been administered to her in a last-ditch effort to make her appear normal.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Surplus Suitor
programme.desc: After a wealthy heiress' uncle is found dead, she is charged with the murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Petty theft from drug and hardware stores leads to a group of four teens who are determined to start their own nation on a remote island off the California coast.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An elderly maid leaves the parsonage in search of her sister.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Eldon Marsh sets out to confront the man who stole his wife from him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A witness against a crime boss is murdered just before he can reveal the syndicate's plans.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "A serial murder targets Cannon as his next victim. At first the homicide wanted to be finally released from his compulsion to kill. Cannon accepted to help him. But Cannon got too involved in the killer's demands."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While on vacation, Betty meets a doctor who's being stalked by a trio of bikers.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a nine-month old child is beaten, Friday and Gannon investigate the parents, who are more concerned about their failing relationship than their baby son.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con accused of extortion is interrogated. He calmly and smugly insists that he is innocent, but Friday and Gannon have a surprise for him: taped conversations and a voice analysis device.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: During a seemingly routine traffic stop, Malloy and Reed are ambushed and kidnapped by two men who are on the run after a foiled robbery attempt. Their only hope is a young woman who is led to believe that Malloy and Reed killed her brother.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed thinks he can haggle another $12.50 off a used car, but malloy warns him that he's pushing his luck. On patrol, they test a suspected drunk driver who hit a light pole, investigate a home invasion that results in a man fatally shooting his ex-son-in-

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "The classic tale of "The Elves and the Shoemaker" is given a summer Toony twist!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Larry and Beaver spend the day at the lake, which is where they encounter two kids who let them borrow their boat. However, little do Larry and Beaver know, the boat is stolen.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While his class is reciting a poem about trees, Beaver remembers a tree that Ward had given him for his birthday when they lived at their old house. Wanting "his" tree back, Beaver and Larry go to Beaver's old home and promptly dig it up.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Unwelcome Well
programme.desc: Powerful and avaricious businessman Jerome Klee has made a fortune in oil and intends to make a lot more. But after crossing a business associate and his wife, he turns up dead.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Anthony Stewart is charged with murdering Michael Russell, the husband of the woman with whom he has been sleeping. Although Stewart, a visiting British ambassador, has diplomatic immunity, he refuses to use it and wants to clean his name.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Attorney Virgil Tibbs returns to Sparta and is soon assigned his first case as a defense attorney.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The forestry student who previously visited Waltons Mountain (in "The Competition"") now returns

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Chester purchases a piece of land when he gets engaged.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After he shoots and kills an armed robber, Candy helps the man's widow and young son run their farm—while the widow plans her revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Several men are vying for a rancher's daughter's affections. When she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Shotgun man John Beaumont, who Lucas sent to prison, returns with vengeance on his mind.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Kidnapped, Flint is forced to scout and find a lost Aztec treasure. As some of the men were previously thrown off the wagon train, their unfriendliness is certain unless he can help them find the lost treasure of Montezuma.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Johnny is assigned to conduct a school tour of Rampart hospital. A veteran mentally reliving a battle is subdued by the paramedics. A woman gets stuck in a dog door. A famous novelist attempts suicide. A cargo plane crashes in a residential area, hitting a school bus.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester, Pierce and Hunnicutt find themselves in the sticky position of having to decide which enlisted men to recommend for promotion. For Winchester it could be a matter of life and death.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is the golden boy of the world press when he treats a celebrity prizefighter, "Gentleman" Joe Cavanaugh, who has a stroke at the 4077th. Father Mulcahy finds the news hard to take, as Cavanaugh was a hero of his.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After losing to the Marines once again, Colonel Potter wishes there was one sport the 4077th were any good at. When Klinger mentions he can bowl, the Colonel decides to have a bowling competition. Unfortunately, he and Klinger are the only two good bowlers in the camp, so BJ and Father Mulcahy are "recruited" to the team.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter's attempts to assemble the crew for a family portrait are thwarted by a feud between bunkmates Pierce, Hunnicutt and Winchester. Things are not helped by the efforts of Margaret, Klinger and Mulcahy to bring the Swampmen back together.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a Hollywood film crew decides to use Mayberry as a backdrop for a movie, everyone in town begins to put on airs, risking the small-town charm that attracted the crew in the first place.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ignoring his own advice to Opie, Andy plays fast and loose with the facts when trying to sell the old town cannon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed is feeling poorly, and the family is worried about him. To make Elly feel better, Jed reveals that he is faking an illness to please Granny. When Drysdale hears of this, he decides to help out, too, and fakes illness as well. When Drysdale’s doctor, Dr. Clyburn, hears of this, he rushes over to the Clampett mansion. Granny mistakes Clyburn as a patient and puts him in bed with Jed and Drysdale.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph and Norton don't want to take their wives on a Raccoon fishing trip.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan arranges for Burkhalter's sister to keep Klink occupied, so he can leave camp and blow up a train.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses the car of an SS man who's just married Klink's old girlfriend and is honeymooning in Paris, where Hogan needs to pass radios to the underground.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A superstitious newlywed becomes obsessed by a penny fortune-telling machine when he and his new wife are stranded with car trouble.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Golden Oranges
programme.desc: Mason goes to the dogs when his defense of a murder suspect hinges on a surprise witness—a dog named Hard Tack. It seems as though Hard Tack holds the key to the murder of a developer who planned to bulldoze orange groves.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are screening applicants for the Police Academy. One seems to have all the right qualifications, except that six months are missing from his application.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman has problems staying away from the race track and it threatens her marriage.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: "A marriage about to be broken is saved by a killer."

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The wife of a money man for the mob is killed during a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.sub-title: He Who Digs A Grave: Part 2
programme.desc: A lady journalist is forced to reveal her sources in a murder news or she will go to jail on a contempt charge. She enlist Cannon's service to unravel the murder of a missing excursionist.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A girl begins to see future fatal accidents while exploring the occult.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon learn that a young man has called his mother from Hollywood "to say goodbye." With the help of the man's sister, the two detectives trace the impending suicide to a hotel with more than 1,200 rooms.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Petty theft from drug and hardware stores leads to a group of four teens who are determined to start their own nation on a remote island off the California coast.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While off duty following shooting re-qualification, Reed fires his weapon at a would-be unarmed mugger whose armed accomplish drives off. When the would-be suspect later dies, the unfortunate circumstances leave Reed facing a possible suspension and murder charge.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy wins $10,000 in a contest to name a new woman's shampoo, resulting in a lot of unwanted advice on how to use the money. On patrol, he and reed deal with a loud music complaint that has a romantic sub-context, encounter a sniper perched atop a parki

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver gets a surprise when June invites Miss Landers over for dinner and Larry convinces him that something bad might happen. This leads Beaver to become a nervous wreck as he tries to make sure his parents don't do anything to embarrass him. Meanwhile, Larry charges a quarter to anyone who wants to spy on Miss Landers eating dinner at the Cleavers.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has his fortune read by a machine and becomes convinced nothing but good luck is headed his way. However, he doesn't feel that way when Larry sets it up so that Beaver will have to fight a 5th grader, Sonny Cartwright.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Dead Ringer
programme.desc: While Mason is representing Barbara Kramer, who accuses Otis Swanson of stealing her father's intellectual property, Swanson hatches a nefarious scheme to discredit Mason and distract him from the case. Mason loses the case; however, Swanson soon turns up dead and Mason now defends Kramer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: "After Anthony Stewart is nearly killed in a hit and run, Matlock realises that the only way to clear him is to find Shelby Russell, the supposed witness whose claim put Stewart in the hot seat in the first place. He tracks her down via her mother, and tells her that if she doesn't take the stand, her lover will go down for Michael Russell's murder."

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba travels to Atlanta to help his nephew after the boy overdoses on drugs. He soon teams up with a street wise cop to take down the drug ring.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John takes a job away from home to make more money

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Milly Glover decides to marry the first available man in order to support herself and her brother.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe and Candy help a timid young woman stand up to her domineering father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon turns to Lucas for protection from his vengeful brothers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Her father on his deathbed, Christine Elliot decides to fulfill his dream of a boys school and joins the wagon train. However, one man is determined to stop her unless he collects his pound of flesh.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.sub-title: It's How You Play The Game
programme.desc: John agrees that the losing baseball team at the fireman's picnic will pay for the picnic. Chet becomes Station 51's only hope when their pitcher breaks his arm. A drunk driver becomes violent after crashing his car; another man is trapped in a car with a tiger. A man with a back problem must be extricated from his waterbed.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger buys a goat, with the intention of getting rich by selling its milk. Then the goat eats the 4077th's $22,340 payroll, leaving paymaster Hawkeye holding the bag. Meanwhile, Charles also thinks he can make a killing when he sees an ancient vase.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret and her nursing staff are about to be inspected by Col. Bucholz. Meanwhile, Kellye is offended that Hawkeye is attracted to nurses besides her.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the 4077th, and the staff dons costumes and trades ghost stories. Father Mulcahy discovers a soldier alive that had been pronounced dead.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The Army tries to get a North Korean pilot to defect, and Charles gets a rude shock when he falls for a French nurse with a Bohemian past.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Andy teases the fairer sex about gossiping, Aunt Bee pulls a prank to prove that men are gossips, too.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is chosen to be the sole judge of a local beauty pageant. The entrants include Floyd's niece, the mayor's daughter and Ellie Walker.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A young girl shows up at the Clampett mansion, claiming she is a friend from back home, Emaline Fetty. The Clampetts welcome her into their house. But it turns out that Emaline is working with someone to blackmail the Clampetts. She takes pictures of her and Jed in a compromising position. Colonel Foxhall, the man who is in control of the caper, and Emaline develop the photos and show them to Jane and Drysdale, who believe something else is going on.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph and Ed play pool with Ralph's boss and Ed gets a job at the bus company.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets himself sent to the hospital so he can get information from a wounded agent.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and crew are ordered to deliver airdropped ammo to the underground.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging actor longing for the good old days is given a sobering glimpse of the past he holds so dear.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lawful Lazarus
programme.desc: When a man declared legally dead suddenly re-appears and tries to get a hold of his dying wife's money in order to protect their children's interests, her entire family rallies against him until one of them turns up murdered. "Lazarus" is naturally charged.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $100,000 has been embezzled from an industrial company. An investigation of the employees leads Friday and Gannon to a habitual gambler.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A war hero must choose between a new love and the girl he left behind.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.sub-title: The Right Kind Of A House
programme.desc: A woman schemes to avenge her son's death with a unique plan.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix gets involved with the case of a serial killer after his friend becomes the latest victim. But not all is as it seems when he discovers the killer may not be responsible for every murder.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A rich lady, Cecilia Lasher, hires Cannon to locate the son her husband abandoned years before. She turns to Cannon after being blackmailed and terrorized.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates the death of a reporter who was about to break a huge story.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are screening applicants for the Police Academy. One seems to have all the right qualifications, except that six months are missing from his application.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $100,000 has been embezzled from an industrial company. An investigation of the employees leads Friday and Gannon to a habitual gambler.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed return a young runaway to his home while responding to a domestic disturbance call at the same address, discovering a dysfunctional situation that appears to be escalating toward a tragic conclusion. In the meantime, they search for a female drug pusher who mistakes a stranger for a fellow pusher, investigate a man attempting to force his way into a truck and encounter a wino riding a stolen bike at night.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are stunned to discover that the driver who led them on a high-speed chase is the son of Sgt. MacDonald, and Malloy takes it upon himself to help his boss figure out why the young man is acting out. In the meantime, they investigate a possible burglary in progress at an apartment building, mediate a dispute at a park over an elderly woman feeding ducks, respond to a call of two armed men fighting over a woman and deal with a wino who is attempting to direct traffic at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony celebrate Jolly July!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward loans Beaver 25 cents but gives him a dollar, expecting 75 cents as change. However, Larry manages to convince Beaver to loan him the 75 cents. When Larry doesn't pay him back when he said he was going to, a feud erupts.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver buys a common magic trick but is disappointed by everyone's "that's nice" reaction. He gets a totally different reaction out of Bengie, however, when Larry and Beaver convince him that Beaver has been turned into a rock.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Misguided Model
programme.desc: After he accidentally kills his friend's attacker—and she has him dispose of the body without alerting the authorities—a guilt-stricken ex-boxer decides to report the incident to Mason.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend Laura McCord after she's charged with murdering her husband, David, in a jealous rage. Matlock and Julie soon realize that David's lover is the key to the case, but she seems to have disappeared.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A neglected baby stirs maternal feelings in Luann.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Erin graduates from high school still having no direction for her life

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt helps an Indian-hating officer find a white girl, hoping the search will not end in violence.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe's friend, Wade Turner, is struck a devastating blow when he develops a brain tumor that afflicts him a paralyzing sensitivity to bright light and will soon render him blind.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race, hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner, who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Bill and the Major find a man lying hurt, and bring him into the wagon train. When he meets an innocent woman in the group who has an inheritance waiting for her, he shows other skills besides being just a schoolteacher—and her mother is wary.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: An elderly man is trapped in his burning house. Chet becomes obsessed with ridding the station of an uninvited guest. Paramedics and doctors treat a man who suffers repeated cardiac arrests. Dixie comforts the husband of an elderly patient. Roy and John help break up a fight. Several crises occur at an apartment house hit by a jet fighter.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Tired of reminders about Trapper John's skill as a practical joker, B.J. bets Hawkeye he can prank everyone present.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye volunteers to deliver the eulogy for a dead nurse that he briefly dated, and belatedly discovers her deep feelings for him.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Posing the theory that people will believe in anything, Charles and Hawkeye start a rumor that Marilyn Monroe plans to visit the 4077th, which gets everyone excited. Meanwhile, B.J. feels responsible when he's unable to rescue a wounded soldier, and is less than impressed when he is presented with a Bronze Star.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and the crew surprise Colonel Potter with a party to commemorate Mildred's final payment on the couple's mortgage.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney, on a spree of destroying illegal stills, are surprised when a trail leads them to two spinster sisters.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy counsels a Mayberry couple who are constantly bickering with each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale is intent on getting the Clampetts to identify Colonel Foxhall and Emaline Fetty as dangerous criminals. Emaline is in hiding, but visits Jethro, tricking him into helping her hide from the police. The Clampetts mistake the officer that brought Foxhall as a criminal, and Foxhall gets away from the man holding him and hides in the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: When the Kramdens and Nortons enter a Raccoon costume contest a feud arises between Ralph and Ed.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan faces a startling development: His captors are sending him to America to demand surrender—with a super weapon supposedly supplied by the Russians.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must destroy an anti-aircraft defense system designed by a beautiful English woman who may have defected to Germany.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small-time crooks end up with a camera that takes photos of events five minutes into the future.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Velvet Claws
programme.desc: A photographer snaps a picture of politico Harrison Burke and a married woman, Eva Belter, as they leave a local gambling establishment. Eva goes to Mason for help and tells him that a scandal sheet called "Spicy Bits" is blackmailing her.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are on a mission to bolster community relations when a young and slightly militant black man barricades himself in his apartment rather than submit to a traffic warrant.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A beautiful woman meets and falls in love with a stranger at her engagement party.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: "A reporter goes from star to villain and then back to "star.""

programme.title: Mannix
programme.sub-title: Dark So Early, Dark So Long
programme.desc: Mannix sets out to clear an old school friend of murder. The problem is that she, being an alcoholic, can't remember what she was doing when the murder occurred.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Frank travels to a small ranching town to help out a writer friend charged with a double murder. Frank's only clue is a cryptic note left by the man's wife.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A rancher believes his son's death was not an accident.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: When Charley and Floyd stop the Cannonball to pick apples for Kate's bachelor butter recipe, a passenger and food salesman, Jack Crandall, is shocked.
